zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena de Stafford於1095年出生在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福時，她的父親Nicholas de Stafford21歲，母親Maud Moolte18歲。她和William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1166年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena de Stafford于1095年出生在英国德比夏爾德拉可洛福时，她的父亲Nicholas de Stafford21岁，母亲Maud Moolte18岁。她和William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1166年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena de Stafford was born in 1095, in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England, her father, Nicholas de Stafford, was 21 and her mother, Maud Moolte, was 18. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley. She died in 1166, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena de Stafford est née en 1095, à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Stafford, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud Moolte, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley. Elle est décédée en 1166, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena de Stafford 1095 in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Stafford 21 und ihre Mutter Maud Moolte 18. Sie hatte mit William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1166 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena de Stafford è nata il nel 1095 nel Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas de Stafford, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Maud Moolte, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley. Morì nel 1166, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena de Staffordが1095年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Staffordは21歳，母Maud Moolteは18歳であった。彼女はWilliam FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresleyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1166年にフランスピカーディソンメで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena de Stafford(이)가 1095년 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Stafford(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Moolte(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elena de Stafford nasceu em 1095, em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas de Stafford, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maud Moolte, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley. Ela faleceu em 1166, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena de Stafford родилась в 1095 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Stafford было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Moolte, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley. Она умерла в 1166 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena de Stafford nació en 1095, en Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Stafford, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Maud Moolte, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley. Murió en 1166, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
